phase.goal: Record accepted baseline after legacy removal and GRACE slice audit.

wave.title: Legacy snapshot removed
wave.evidence: Solar Sage commit a211e86; migration packets archived under grace/packets/archive/.

phase.goal: Adopt GRACE headers, module contracts, module maps, named blocks, function contracts, and log declarations slice-by-slice.
phase.rule: Do not move runtime files just because slice docs changed.
Do not mass-apply markers across unrelated slices in one packet.

wave.title: Adopt Today and Calendar slice
wave.write-scope: components/today/ · components/calendar/ · app/(grace)/today/ · lib/today.ts · lib/calendar.ts · nearby tests
wave.exit-criteria: Changed files have GRACE markers; TabBar remains Shell/Navigation; coverage audit check passes.

wave.title: Adopt backend API and services slices
wave.exit-criteria: Routers stay thin; touched services declare side effects and log names where logging exists; tests pass.

wave.title: Adopt contracts slice
wave.exit-criteria: Pydantic remains source of truth; generated TypeScript is deterministic; frontend uses packages/contracts for new payload types.

wave.title: Reconcile logging implementation with GRACE contracts
wave.write-scope: lib/grace/ · backend logging helpers · scripts/grace/coverage_audit.py if detector must be improved
wave.exit-criteria: Audit detector matches project logging; files with logs declare emitted log names.

wave.title: Adopt profile and onboarding slice
wave.write-scope: components/profile/ · components/onboarding/ · app/(grace)/profile/ · app/(grace)/onboarding/ · related tests
wave.exit-criteria: Profile and onboarding flows keep existing behavior.

wave.title: Adopt tests and guardrails around touched slices
wave.exit-criteria: Tests are marked near their owning runtime slice; guardrails stay deterministic.

phase.goal: Run future business features only after mapping them to slices, write scope, frozen scope, and gates.

wave.exit-criteria: Every packet names affected slices and keeps coverage_audit.py --check green when slice docs or tooling change.
